title: First Job, First Pressure
text: You are young, low on money, and trying to build your future. A local café offers you a stable but tiring job, while your friend asks you to join a risky online business.

choices.text: Take the café job for stability
choices.result: You gain some stability, but routine begins to wear you down.

choices.text: Join your friend and try the business
choices.result: You chase opportunity, but your future becomes less certain.

choices.text: Focus on learning a valuable skill instead
choices.result: You invest in yourself, hoping the payoff comes later.

title: A New City Calls
text: A chance appears to move to a bigger city with more opportunity. The cost of living is much higher, but so is your potential.

choices.result: The city excites you, but survival becomes more expensive.
You stay safe financially, though life feels smaller.
You test the waters without fully committing.

title: The Tempting Shortcut
text: Someone offers you a fast way to make money online. It sounds easy, but something about it feels dangerous.

choices.result: The money arrives quickly, but danger follows close behind.
You protect your future, even if it feels frustrating now.
You buy yourself time by learning more.

title: The Expensive Dream
text: A course appears that could change your future, but it costs a painful amount of money. It could be a breakthrough or a mistake.

choices.result: You take a serious bet on your future.

choices.text: Keep the money and learn for free
choices.result: You stay safer financially and progress more slowly.
You move faster, but pressure builds behind the scenes.

title: Love or Ambition
text: Someone important in your life wants more time from you, but your ambitions are accelerating. You cannot fully prioritize both.

choices.result: Your heart feels fuller, though your progress slows.
You move forward quickly, but emotionally it costs you.
You hold both worlds together, but the strain is real.

title: Burnout Warning
text: You have been pushing too hard for too long. Your body and mind are sending you a warning.

choices.result: You slow down and recover some of what you lost.
You get more done, but you feel yourself cracking.
You choose moderation and regain some balance.

title: An Investment Opportunity
text: A friend shows you a small investment opportunity. It might help you grow your money, or it might go badly.

choices.result: You go in hard and hope the opportunity works in your favor.
You take a measured approach and protect yourself somewhat.
You stay safe, though you wonder what could have happened.
